Package org.howard.edu.lsp.assignment4

Class IntegerSet

java.lang.Object
org.howard.edu.lsp.assignment4.IntegerSet
public class IntegerSet extends Object
Public class with multiple functions for creating and manipulating sets
Author:
Lauren Guthrie

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    IntegerSet()
    Default Constructor for IntegerSet

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(int item)
    Adds a given value to a set and does nothing if it already exists within the set
    void
    clear()
    Clears all values within a set
    boolean
    contains(int value)
    Searches a set for a given value and determines if the set contains the value
    int
    diff(IntegerSet intSetb)
    Sums each value within the first and second Integer Sets and calculates the difference
    boolean
    equals(IntegerSet b)
    Determines if two IntegerSets are equal
    void
    intersect(IntegerSet intSetb)
    Finds the intersection between two IntegerSets
    int
    largest()
    Finds the largest value in a given set
    int
    length()
    Finds the length of a given set.
    void
    remove(int item)
    Removes a given value from the set
    int
    smallest()
    Finds the smallest value in a given set
    String
    toString()
    Creates the string representation of a given set
    void
    union(IntegerSet intSetb)
    Determines the union of two IntegerSets

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • IntegerSet

      public IntegerSet()
      Default Constructor for IntegerSet

  • Method Details

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears all values within a set

    • length

      public int length()
      Finds the length of a given set.
      Returns:
      int value of the length of the set

    • equals

      public boolean equals(IntegerSet b)
      Determines if two IntegerSets are equal
      Parameters:
      b - IntegetSet
      Returns:
      boolean value of whether the sets are equal

    • contains

      public boolean contains(int value)
      Searches a set for a given value and determines if the set contains the value
      Parameters:
      value - int value of integer to search for
      Returns:
      boolean value if the set contains the given value

    • largest

      public int largest() throws org.howard.edu.lsp.assignment4.IntegerSetException
      Finds the largest value in a given set
      Returns:
      max_num: integer value of the max value in the set
      Throws:
      org.howard.edu.lsp.assignment4.IntegerSetException - String message if the given set is empty

    • smallest

      public int smallest() throws org.howard.edu.lsp.assignment4.IntegerSetException
      Finds the smallest value in a given set
      Returns:
      min_num: integer value of the minimum value in a set
      Throws:
      org.howard.edu.lsp.assignment4.IntegerSetException - String message if the given set is empty

    • add

      public void add(int item)
      Adds a given value to a set and does nothing if it already exists within the set
      Parameters:
      item - : integer value to be added to the set

    • remove

      public void remove(int item)
      Removes a given value from the set
      Parameters:
      item - : integer value to remove from a set

    • union

      public void union(IntegerSet intSetb)
      Determines the union of two IntegerSets
      Parameters:
      intSetb - : IntegerSet to be combined with the given set

    • intersect

      public void intersect(IntegerSet intSetb)
      Finds the intersection between two IntegerSets
      Parameters:
      intSetb - : IntegerSet to intersect with the given set

    • diff

      public int diff(IntegerSet intSetb)
      Sums each value within the first and second Integer Sets and calculates the difference
      Parameters:
      intSetb - Second Integer Set
      Returns:
      The difference between the first and second integer set.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Creates the string representation of a given set
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      string_rep: String representation of the set
